title: Custodian Investment Plc Reassures Shareholders of Sustainable Growth Amid Regulatory Penalties - FinancialEDGE
description: Custodian Investment Plc's board of directors has assured existing and prospective shareholders of the company's commitment to sustainable growth, despite paying N19.173 million in regulatory penalties for the financial year ended December 31, 2024. This Group Managing Director Wole Oshin gave the assurance at the company's 30th Annual General Meeting in Lagos. The company incurred
html: Custodian Investment Plc’s board of directors has assured existing and prospective shareholders of the company’s commitment to sustainable growth, despite paying N19.173 million in regulatory penalties for the financial year ended December 31, 2024.
